abilities.description: Change the target of target spell with a single target if that target is you. The new target must be a player. X is twice the mana value of that spell.

effect.description: Change the target of target spell with a single target if that target is you. The new target must be a player. X is twice the mana value of that spell.
effect.name: ChangeTargets

abilities.target_prompt: Select target spell with a single target targeting you
